response.justification: Bogdan has solid full-stack and distributed systems fundamentals spanning 15+ years, with notable high-throughput work at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second. However, the role demands deep, domain-specific expertise in experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, and statistical analysis workflows — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. The seniority bar is Principal/IC6, requiring demonstrated cross-org technical leadership on growth and measurement systems, which is also absent. The candidate's current trajectory (TypeScript product work, MCP tooling, open-source GIS) is genuinely interesting but orthogonal to what this role requires.
strengths: 15+ years of breadth across embedded, backend, and distributed systems including high-throughput low-latency services at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/s)
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work at re:cinq shows engagement with modern tooling and agentic workflows
Strong testing culture (TDD, CI/CD, Fluent-Asserts library, recurring Refactoring Dojos) aligns with engineering rigor expected at this level
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, bias detection, or experiment assignment systems
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background; growth measurement, instrumentation pipelines, and funnel analysis are entirely absent from the resume
Current title is Senior/Staff, not Principal; no demonstrated cross-team technical leadership or multi-workstream ownership at the IC6 scope the role requires
